sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109560" key="u(poxauno/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποχαυν-όω</orth>, <sense id="n109560.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make somewhat conceited, puff up,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.21c</biblScope> </bibl>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἡμιτελῆ τὸν λόγον ὑ. τῷ πάθει</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">letting</tr_> his words <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">die away</tr_> half-finished (of one just falling asleep), Procop.Gaz.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.159B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
